description: Maps each invalid fixture to the rule it violates. Each file contains exactly one violation, so a failure that disappears signals a regression in the schema.

valid.exercises: Only the required fields: msd_version, last_updated, provider{provider_id,name}, one service (service_id, service_type, name, mode, service_area with one zone).

Every optional object: operating_hours (default + dated exceptions), vehicles, accessibility, service_area constraints, fare_structures with discounts (requires_credential: ch-halbtax), payment_methods, vat, booking_rules, settlement, routing_hints, references (incl. null values per C1).

invalid.violates: Root 'provider' is required and is omitted.
'services' has minItems: 1 but is an empty array.
service.service_type 'taxi' is not in the service_type registry code list (Convention C2).
fare_structure rule 'price' must be a number; supplied as the string "5.00".
zone geometry.type 'Circle' is not a permitted GeoJSON type (Polygon | MultiPolygon).
fare_structure.currency 'Franken' does not match the ISO 4217 pattern ^[A-Z]{3}$.
